items.title: 2026 Belmont Stakes odds, date, predictions: Expert who hit 4 of last 8 winners reveals horse racing picks
items.summary: Jody Demling, who has called four of the last eight Belmont champions, reveals his 2026 Belmont Stakes picks for Saturday, June 6 at Saratoga Race Course
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Stubbs powers Hants to T20 Blast win against Essex
items.summary: Tristan Stubbs and Scott Currie play starring roles as Hampshire inflict a 30-run T20 Blast defeat on Essex.
